changes: Telegram: view/edit the webhook endpoint domain (SERVER_BASE_URL) from the admin menu
New 🌐 Webhook screen on the admin main menu shows active + pending URL and deploy mode
Edit flow: input -> validate -> confirm -> write .env (restart to apply); auto-detects Render (read-only + dashboard link) vs local (.env editable)
Reuses apps.lib.env_manager for atomic .env writes; audit-logs change_webhook_url
notes: The bot edits the configured URL string only; creating/rotating the Cloudflare tunnel stays host-side. get_config is cached so edits apply after a server restart (screen shows pending vs active).
